en: After we were brought safely through, we then learned that the island was called Malta.
zh: 我們脫險之後，才知道那島名叫馬爾他。

en: The native people showed us unusual kindness, for they kindled a fire and welcomed us all, because it had begun to rain and was cold.
zh: 當地的人對我們非常友善；因為下過一場雨，天氣又冷，他們就生了火來招待我們。

en: When Paul had gathered a bundle of sticks and put them on the fire, a viper came out because of the heat and fastened on his hand.
zh: 保羅拾了一捆乾柴，放在火上的時候，有一條毒蛇，受不住熱，爬了出來，纏住他的手。

en: When the native people saw the creature hanging from his hand, they said to one another, "No doubt this man is a murderer. Though he has escaped from the sea, Justice has not allowed him to live."
zh: 當地的人看見那條蛇懸在他手上，就彼此說：“這個人一定是兇手，雖然從海裡脫險，天理也不容他活著！”

en: He, however, shook off the creature into the fire and suffered no harm.
zh: 但是保羅卻把那條蛇抖在火裡，自己一點也沒有受傷。

en: They were waiting for him to swell up or suddenly fall down dead. But when they had waited a long time and saw no misfortune come to him, they changed their minds and said that he was a god.
zh: 他們等著看他發腫，或者忽然暴斃。但等了很久，見他平安無事，就轉念說，他是個神明。

en: Now in the neighborhood of that place were lands belonging to the chief man of the island, named Publius, who received us and entertained us hospitably for three days.
zh: 那地附近有些田產，是島上的首領部百流所擁有的。他歡迎我們，善意招待我們三天。

en: It happened that the father of Publius lay sick with fever and dysentery. And Paul visited him and prayed, and putting his hands on him healed him.
zh: 那時，部百流的父親患了痢疾，發熱臥病在床，保羅到他那裡，為他祈禱按手，醫好了他。

en: And when this had taken place, the rest of the people on the island who had diseases also came and were cured.
zh: 這麼一來，島上其他有病的都來了，也都治好了。

en: They also honored us greatly, and when we were about to sail, they put on board whatever we needed.
zh: 他們多方面尊敬我們；到開船的時候，又把我們所需要的東西送來。

en: After three months we set sail in a ship that had wintered in the island, a ship of Alexandria, with the twin gods as a figurehead.
zh: 過了三個月，我們上了一艘亞歷山太來的船。這船在島上過冬，船的名字是“宙斯雙子”。

en: Putting in at Syracuse, we stayed there for three days.
zh: 到了敘拉古，我們停留了三天。

en: And from there we made a circuit and arrived at Rhegium. And after one day a south wind sprang up, and on the second day we came to Puteoli.
zh: 從那裡繞道航行，來到利基翁。過了一天，起了南風，第二天到達部丟利。

en: There we found brothers and were invited to stay with them for seven days. And so we came to Rome.
zh: 我們在那裡遇見一些弟兄，他們邀請我們一同住了七天。這樣，我們就來到了羅馬。

en: And the brothers there, when they heard about us, came as far as the Forum of Appius and Three Taverns to meet us. On seeing them, Paul thanked God and took courage.
zh: 弟兄們聽到了我們的消息，就從羅馬出來，在亞比烏和三館迎接我們。保羅見了他們，就感謝 神，膽子也壯了起來。

en: And when we came into Rome, Paul was allowed to stay by himself, with the soldier that guarded him.
zh: 我們到了羅馬，保羅獲准獨自與看守他的士兵居住。

en: After three days he called together the local leaders of the Jews, and when they had gathered, he said to them, "Brothers, though I had done nothing against our people or the customs of our fathers, yet I was delivered as a prisoner from Jerusalem into the hands of the Romans.
zh: 過了三天，保羅請猶太人的首領來。他們都到了，保羅說：“各位弟兄，我雖然沒有作過甚麼事反對人民或者反對祖先的規例，卻像囚犯被逮捕，從耶路撒冷交到羅馬人的手裡。

en: When they had examined me, they wished to set me at liberty, because there was no reason for the death penalty in my case.
zh: 他們審訊之後，因為在我身上沒有甚麼該死的罪，就想要釋放我。

en: But because the Jews objected, I was compelled to appeal to Caesar- though I had no charge to bring against my nation.
zh: 可是猶太人反對，我迫不得已才上訴凱撒，並不是有甚麼事要控告我的國民。

en: For this reason, therefore, I have asked to see you and speak with you, since it is because of the hope of Israel that I am wearing this chain."
zh: 因此，我請你們來見面談談。我原是為了以色列的盼望，才帶上這條鎖鍊的。”

en: And they said to him, "We have received no letters from Judea about you, and none of the brothers coming here has reported or spoken any evil about you.
zh: 他們說：“我們沒有收到猶太來的信，是提到你的，弟兄中也沒有人來報告，或說你甚麼壞話。

en: But we desire to hear from you what your views are, for with regard to this sect we know that everywhere it is spoken against."
zh: 但我們覺得應該聽聽你本人的意見，因為關於這教派，我們知道是到處遭人反對的。”

en: When they had appointed a day for him, they came to him at his lodging in greater numbers. From morning till evening he expounded to them, testifying to the kingdom of God and trying to convince them about Jesus both from the Law of Moses and from the Prophets.
zh: 他們和保羅約好了一個日子，到那日有很多人到他的住所來見他。他從早到晚向他們講解，為 神的國竭力作見證，引用摩西的律法和先知的話勸他們信耶穌。

en: And some were convinced by what he said, but others disbelieved.
zh: 他所說的話，有人信服，也有人不信。

en: And disagreeing among themselves, they departed after Paul had made one statement: "The Holy Spirit was right in saying to your fathers through Isaiah the prophet:
zh: 他們彼此不合，就分散了。未散以前，保羅說了幾句話：“聖靈藉以賽亞先知對你們祖先所說的，一點不錯。

en: "'Go to this people, and say, You will indeed hear but never understand, and you will indeed see but never perceive.
zh: 他說： ‘你去告訴這人民： 你們聽是聽見了，總是不明白； 看是看見了，總是不領悟。

en: For this people's heart has grown dull, and with their ears they can barely hear, and their eyes they have closed; lest they should see with their eyes and hear with their ears and understand with their heart and turn, and I would heal them.'
zh: 因為這人民的心思遲鈍， 用不靈的耳朵去聽， 又閉上了眼睛； 免得自己眼睛看見， 耳朵聽見， 心裡明白，回轉過來， 我就醫好他們。’

en: Therefore let it be known to you that this salvation of God has been sent to the Gentiles; they will listen."
zh: 所以你們應當知道， 神這救恩，已經傳給外族人，他們也必聽從。”
保羅在自己所租的房子裡，住了整整兩年。凡來見他的人，他都接待，

en: He lived there two whole years at his own expense, and welcomed all who came to him,
zh: 並且放膽地傳講 神的國，教導有關主耶穌基督的事，沒有受到甚麼禁止。

en: proclaiming the kingdom of God and teaching about the Lord Jesus Christ with all boldness and without hindrance.
